principle: DAG/ready-set scheduling. Nodes 09, 18, 19, and 20 are roots. Small-batch synthesis and gray test are preserved as waived placeholders per user instruction.

09.name: stage1-template-metric-ingest
09.role: Ingest Stage1 node-09 template and metric outputs as read-only Stage4 inputs.

18.name: stage3-real-image-gt-ingest
18.role: Ingest Stage3 node-18 real-image records with semi-supervised GT.

19.name: stage3-benchmark-image-gt-ingest
19.role: Ingest Stage3 node-19 existing-benchmark records with official labels or QA and semi-supervised GT.

20.name: stage3-simulator-clean-gt-ingest
20.role: Ingest Stage3 node-20 simulator records with privileged GT.

28.name: template-contract-normalization
28.role: Normalize Stage1 templates into strict template, evidence, and metric contracts.

29.name: evidence-pool-normalization
29.role: Merge three Stage3 branches into a typed evidence pool without losing source provenance.

30.name: template-evidence-binding
30.role: Bind template contracts to qualified evidence records and produce evidence-backed candidate bindings.

31.name: question-form-expansion
31.role: Expand bindings into concrete question blueprints.

32.name: answer-program-metric-code
32.role: Generate executable answer programs, metric registry, scoring interface, and traceability requirements.

33.name: small-batch-synthesis-placeholder
33.role: Intentionally blank per user instruction. Emits WAIVED.json and DONE.json only.

34.name: gray-test-placeholder
34.role: Intentionally blank per user instruction. Emits WAIVED.json and DONE.json only.

35.name: quality-filter-and-selection
35.role: Build deterministic structural filters and deferred pilot-dependent quality hooks.

36.name: full-scale-synthesis
36.role: Run full-scale benchmark item synthesis from blueprints and executable answer programs.

37.name: benchmark-artifact-pack
37.role: Package final EVALSET_DATASET, metrics, dataset card, traceability table, and Stage4 report for Stage5.

forbidden_interpretations: Do not make 18 depend on 19 or 20, or 19 depend on 18 or 20.
Do not let synthetic question text become GT.
Do not fill node 33 or node 34; they are intentionally blank and waived.
Do not execute pilot-dependent CTT, IRT, CDM, or scope conclusions without pilot or model-response data.
